title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (a), GROUP IV, SUBPARAGRAPH 28, FOR THE CITY OF MANILA, PARAGRAPH"f,"SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN, AND TO ADD THERETO A NEW ITEM.

chunks.text:
H. No. 7415 / 53 OG No. 22, 8049 (November 30, 1957

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2014, June 22, 1957 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (

a

), GROUP IV, SUBPARAGRAPH 28, FOR THE CITY OF MANILA, PARAGRAPH

"f,"

SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN, AND TO ADD THERETO A NEW ITEM.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (

a

), page eighty-six, group IV, subparagraph twenty-eight, for the City of Manila, paragraph

"f,"

section two of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven, is amended to read as follows:

"(a) Public Baths and Toilets, 4th District Construction

P15,000.00."

SEC. 2. Between items (

a

) and (

b

), page eighty-six, group IV, subparagraph twenty-eight, for the City of Manila, paragraph

âf,â

section two of the same Act, the following new item is inserted:2014

"(a-l) Araullo High School, Isaac Peral Branch Construction of fence

P 20,000.00" ."

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1957.
